items.raw_desc: Kerti esőztető öntözőfej VERK szolár, úszó, 24315:        This solar fountain will become an original decoration of your garden or terrace. The fountain can be placed in a pond, swimming pool or any container of water. Package contents: fountain, 4 replacement nozzles and instructions for use. items.raw_desc: Légycsapó Verk 24610 Elektromos légycsapó UV fénnyel, 2in1, fehér:The modern Verk 24610 electric insect trap with built-in UV lamp allows you to quickly get rid of flies, mosquitoes and other insects - day or night. It runs on a built-in battery and conveniently charges via the USB-C port, making it ideal for the home, garden, tent or balcony. The device has two independent modes: ON1 - the trap activates the anti-shock net at the push of a button - a safe solution for manual use. ON2 - the trap works automatically. In trap mode, the net remains active at all times and the UV light is also activated, which attracts insects. The trap is equipped with a rechargeable battery that is charged via USB, so there is no need to change the battery. The LED indicates the operating status and charging status. A fully charged trap can last for many hours and thus provides continuous protection against insects.
